title: 🔬 SAVAGE COMMAND BENCHMARKER REPORT 🔬
subtitle: Your commands have been scientifically roasted

majorFindings: Commands suffer from severe over-engineering with complexity scores 900% above recommended levels
Intelligent-refactor-session violates ALL simplicity principles with 41x complexity score
Token consumption ranges from 1500-2662 tokens - equivalent to feeding a neural network entire Wikipedia articles for simple tasks
Commands exhibit pattern of 'enterprise complexity syndrome' - solving 1-line problems with 500-line manifestos

strengths: Lowest complexity score (6) of the bunch
weaknesses: 1521 tokens to switch context? My brain switches faster than this command loads
398 lines to say 'save your work and move on' - that's 397 lines too many
Promises 50% reduction in switching costs but increases cognitive load by 200%
analysis.verdict: Good intentions drowning in verbose implementation. Like using a 47-step manual to flip a light switch.
recommendations: Focus on actual function over documentation theater

weaknesses: 62 functions for 'interactive thinking'? That's not thinking, that's computational constipation
2537 tokens to think interactively? Einstein developed relativity with fewer words
Claims to prevent cognitive overload while being the digital equivalent of drinking from a fire hose
672 lines that could be replaced by 'Think harder' post-it note
analysis.verdict: Peak over-engineering disguised as intelligence. Like building a space shuttle to cross the street.
recommendations: Remember: thinking is a mental process, not a software architecture
Consider therapy for your abstraction addiction

strengths: At least it's not longer than War and Peace
The word 'intelligent' appears multiple times (false advertising)
weaknesses: COMPLEXITY SCORE OF 41! That's 820% above the maximum allowed (5)
2662 tokens to refactor code? That's more content than most code bases
Claims 'intelligent' refactoring while violating every intelligence principle known to computer science
533 lines that could be replaced by 'git mv old.js new.js'
This isn't refactoring - it's academic masturbation with XML tags
analysis.verdict: CATASTROPHIC FAILURE. This is what happens when architects discover markdown. A crime against simplicity.
recommendations: Delete everything and start with 'mv file1 file2'
Seek professional help for pattern addiction
Consider a career in government bureaucracy where this complexity is appreciated
Read the CLAUDE.md rules you apparently ignored

weaknesses: COMPLEXITY SCORE OF 54! That's 1080% above maximum - a new record in terrible design
530 lines to sync git repos? 'git push' is 8 characters, not 530 lines
1899 tokens for git operations that bash scripts handle in 10 lines
Claims 'intelligent' sync while being the opposite of intelligent design
analysis.verdict: Enterprise cancer metastasized into git operations. This is why aliens won't talk to us.
recommendations: Replace entire command with 'git pull && git push'
Study the Unix philosophy (do one thing well)
Consider a different profession, possibly in complexity consulting

strengths: Lowest complexity score (0) - miracle of the modern world
Reasonable length compared to the disasters above
Actually focuses on solving a problem
weaknesses: 1504 tokens to plan a day - most people just use calendars
XML wrapper around what should be simple logic
analysis.verdict: Least terrible of the bunch. Like finding the cleanest bathroom at a truck stop.

immediate: Study the Unix philosophy for 6 months
Read CLAUDE.md rules that you clearly ignored
Implement complexity budget: MAX 5 points per command
strategic: Mandatory simplicity training for all developers
Implement automated complexity scoring with hard limits
Consider switching to a different profession
emergency: Replace with shell scripts until proper solutions exist
Public apology to users forced to endure this complexity

worstOffender.reason: 54x over complexity limit for git operations that should be 1 line

mostPointlesslyVerbose.reason: 533 lines of enterprise theater for file operations

biggestTokenWaster.reason: Burns more tokens than most AI conversations to move files around

finalVerdict.prognosis: Terminal complexity cancer - radical simplification surgery required immediately
finalVerdict.recommendation: Start over. Burn it all down. Learn the word 'simple'.

methodology.samplingMethod: Random selection of 5 commands from 20 available
